response.justification: Well over the required six years of full-stack experience with a stack that closely matches the role: TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes all appear in recent, concrete work. Current AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling experience directly addresses the AI agent development requirement, and a strong testing/TDD background fits the quality-focused responsibilities. The main gaps are no stated Nest.js or Kotlin experience and significant time spent in niche technologies (DLang), but Java exposure and demonstrated polyglot adaptability mitigate these.
strengths: 15+ years of full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB in recent roles
Hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling development, matching the role's AI agent requirement
Strong testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, testing workshops, test tooling authorship)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed
No Kotlin and limited evidence of Python proficiency
Substantial career time in niche DLang work rather than the primary stack
